

## Playground

cd ~

mkdir playground

cd playground

mkdir dir1 dir2



### Playground (cp)

cp /etc/passwd .

ls -l



cp -v /etc/passwd .



cp -i /etc/passwd .





### Playground (mv)



```
mv passwd fun
mv fun dir1
mv dir1/fun dir2
mv dir2/fun .
mv fun dir1
mv dir1 dir2
mv dir2/dir1
mv dir1/fun .
```





### Playground (rm)


```
rm fun-hard
ls -l
rm -i fun
ls -l

less fun-sym
rm fun-sym dir1-sym
ls -l
cd 
rm -r playground
```
